purpose_context: The Spec Kitty dashboard currently embeds all business logic inside HTTP request handlers (features.py, api.py), making the layer untestable in isolation and impossible to migrate to a modern transport framework. This mission follows the established extraction pattern used for src/charter/ and src/doctrine/ to move that logic into a new top-level src/dashboard/ package, reducing src/specify_cli/dashboard/handlers/ to a thin delegation layer. It also adds the dashboard as a documented slice in the functional ownership map and hardens endpoint contracts so dashboard.js continues operating without behavioral regression. FastAPI transport migration is a deliberately sequenced follow-up mission.
purpose_tldr: Extract dashboard business logic into a canonical src/dashboard/ package, register it in the functional ownership map, and stabilise the endpoint contracts for the existing frontend.
source_description: Issues #645 (Epic: Frontend Decoupling and Application API Platform) and #650 (Epic: UI/UX and Shared Design System). Phases 1+2 of the dashboard decoupling sequence; FastAPI migration is a sequenced follow-up.
